# Test Fixtures

Input files used to verify ConFigTree's parsing and code generation.

---

## Excel fixtures (`.xlsx`)

Generated by [`generate_fixtures.py`](generate_fixtures.py). Run with:

```
uv run generate_fixtures.py
```

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `Config_Basic.xlsx` | Strings and ints only; two standard sheets + one empty asset sheet |
| `Config_Types.xlsx` | All supported C# types: `string`, `int`, `double`, `bool`, `DateOnly`, `DateTime`, `TimeOnly` |
| `Config_Assets.xlsx` | Focus on asset schema and `OrchestratorAsset` output |
| `Config_MultiSheet.xlsx` | Five sheets; tests dynamic sheet detection |
| `Config_CustomSheets.xlsx` | Non-standard sheet names; tests mapper with arbitrary names |
| `Config_BadHeader.xlsx` | Missing/empty header rows; tests warning surfacing (#21) |

### Excel sheet schemas

**Standard sheet** — columns: `Name`, `Value`, `Description`

| Column | Role |
|--------|------|
| Name | C# property name (PascalCase-converted) |
| Value | Typed value; cell type determines `string` / `int` / `double` / `bool` / `DateOnly` / `DateTime` / `TimeOnly` |
| Description | XML doc comment (optional) |

**Asset sheet** — detected when column B header is `Asset`; columns: `Name`, `Asset`, `OrchestratorAssetFolder`, `Description`

| Column | Role |
|--------|------|
| Name | C# property name |
| Asset | `OrchestratorAsset.AssetName` |
| OrchestratorAssetFolder | `OrchestratorAsset.Folder` |
| Description | XML doc comment (optional) |

---

## Alternative format fixtures

`Config_Basic.*` files mirror `Config_Basic.xlsx` in each supported (or candidate) format.
They document the intended input schema for future input parsers (#25 JSON, #26 TOML/YAML).

| File | Status |
|------|--------|
| `Config_Basic.json` | Design sample — parser not yet implemented |
| `Config_Basic.yaml` | Design sample — parser not yet implemented |
| `Config_Basic.toml` | Design sample — parser not yet implemented |
| `Config_Basic.ini` | Design sample — parser not yet implemented |

### Schema conventions

**Standard property**

```json
"MaxItemsPerRun": { "value": 10, "description": "Max items to process per run." }
```

```yaml
MaxItemsPerRun:
  value: 10
  description: "Max items to process per run."
```

```toml
MaxItemsPerRun = { value = 10, description = "Max items to process per run." }
```

```ini
MaxItemsPerRun = 10
; INI does not support descriptions
```

**Asset property** — detected by presence of `assetName` + `folder` keys

```json
"CredentialM365": { "assetName": "cred_m365", "folder": "Shared", "description": "M365 credential." }
```

```toml
[Assets.CredentialM365]
assetName   = "cred_m365"
folder      = "Shared"
description = "M365 credential."
```

```ini
; INI uses dotted-key convention within the section
CredentialM365.AssetName = cred_m365
CredentialM365.Folder    = Shared
```

**Nested sections** (JSON/YAML/TOML only — not supported in xlsx or INI)

Nested objects map to nested C# classes, enabled by the IR defined in #24.

```json
"Database": {
  "Primary": {
    "ConnectionString": { "value": "Server=db1;..." },
    "CommandTimeout":   { "value": 30 }
  },
  "Replica": {
    "ConnectionString": { "value": "Server=db2;..." }
  }
}
```

---

## Non-fixture files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `Config_NonXlsx.csv` | Used to test the file-type guard (only `.xlsx` accepted) |
